handoff_contract.design_goal: Make every stage resumable by another AI/agent without relying on conversation history.
read_order: web only when cache is missing, stale, low confidence, or explicitly refreshed

language_policy.display_rule: User-facing explanations, plans, review notes, and recommendations must be written in Chinese while preserving important Japanese game terms.
language_policy.source_content_rule: Store wiki/game source content in Japanese. Do not translate raw facts before storage.
language_policy.key_rule: Use English keys for schemas, indexes, cache manifests, solver fields, and structured records.

token_policy.default_lookup: Read manifest/index first, then only the needed single record.
avoid: loading complete wiki pages into LLM context
loading the whole DB for a targeted query
letting LLM process text that deterministic parsing already handled
token_policy.llm_scope: Only send the smallest failed or ambiguous source snippet needed for semantic parsing.
token_policy.reuse_rule: If content_hash is unchanged and confidence is sufficient, reuse cache.

dimension_policy.rule: During data reading, the agent/parser may judge whether captured keys are sufficient and add or refine optional fields when the source page proves the current schema is incomplete.

review_cadence.rule: After every 30 denko records parsed, stop and review whether captured keys, schemas, review reasons, and evidence fields are still adequate before continuing.

requirements: Keep existing stable keys when possible.
Record why a key was added or changed.
Attach source_url, source section, and evidence snippet or screenshot path.
If the change affects required fields or solver semantics, add a review_queue item.
Do not silently overwrite Japanese source facts.

gameplay_level_policy.rule: Treat only these levels as key checkpoints for skill values and AP/HP summaries. Levels 92/96/100 are VU-specific and should appear only when VU data exists. For newly obtained or low-investment denko, prioritize level 30 and level 50 comparisons.

report_policy.rule: Human-readable run reports should be exported as HTML by default. Markdown summaries may exist only as lightweight intermediate notes.

denko_list.role: Canonical first-pass source for denko ids, list names, detail URLs, type, attribute, color, skill name, VU marker, and remarks.

detail_page.role: Fact authority for skill targets, triggers, constraints, values, VU differences, and exceptions.

manual_override.role: Correction for parser errors. Must include reason and source; unresolved conflicts stay needs_review.

skill_list_or_reverse_index.role: Candidate discovery and rough classification only.

recommendation_prior.role: Reference rating or prior. Never overwrites detail_page facts.

observed_team_case.role: Expert/team screenshot case data for calibration and examples. Never becomes a skill fact by itself.

record_meta_template.source_authority: denko_list | detail_page | recommendation_prior | observed_team_case | manual_override | cache | inferred
